requests.expected_reason: Measure whether exact-FP16 16x16 k_unroll depth improves MAC density enough to revise the PR #981 measured-compute-constrained Llama7B frontier.

requested_items.objective: Measure 16x16 exact-FP16 dense GEMM k1/k2 pipeline and depth scaling under one larger hierarchy-preserving Nangate45 floorplan.
requested_items.notes: Dispatch only after this proposal, the V3 sweep, and the new dense tile configs are merged to master; queue with source_requirement.required_sha set to that merge commit and dispatch_machine_key eval-daemon-b7c2d9c80c1c.
